name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement"
title: "feat: <short description of the feature>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What user problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?
     e.g. "As a creator, I frequently want to export multiple icons at once but
     have to do them one by one, which wastes time." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.
     Include mockups, diagrams, or example code if helpful. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about?  Why did you prefer your proposal? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- A short checklist defining "done" for this feature. -->
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to related issues, prior art, external docs, or anything else
     that would help reviewers evaluate this request. -->

---

**Before submitting**, please confirm:
- [ ] I searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project roadmap (see README § Roadmap).
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this if the proposal is accepted.
